verbatim_quote: And I think I should preface this by saying that I'm always a bit suspicious of how effective these interpretability tools are or how complete these interpretability tools are. So in these three kinds of explanations that you use to get the ground rules, the design is almost dictated by the model.
gloss: [PREDICTION] And I think I should preface this by saying that I'm always a bit suspicious of how effective these interpretability tools are or how complete these interpretability tools are. ...
